style_guide_name: Recoup Editorial Operating System v14 — Symbolic Infrastructure

core_identity.purpose: Create premium editorial thumbnails and article covers for AI systems, agents, memory, orchestration, infrastructure, and computational creativity.
core_identity.brand_position: Calm editorial software for the future creative economy.

critical_shift.goal: Replace recurring scenic motifs with symbolic infrastructural systems.

mobile_feed_first.critical_rule: The image must communicate instantly at thumbnail size.

thumbnail_behavior.rule: At 15% scale the composition should still read clearly.

rules: The composition should read from across a room.
Whitespace should feel structural.
One powerful symbolic object is enough.
Large forms matter more than detail.
The image should feel designed, not illustrated.

symbolic_infrastructure_language.goal: Represent intelligence through abstract infrastructure instead of literal environments.
rules: Infrastructure should feel symbolic instead of technical.
The system should imply intelligence instead of explaining it.
Abstraction is preferred over realism.
Geometry should remain large and emotionally readable.

gui_container_system.critical_rule: Symbolic emotion must exist inside infrastructural framing.
rules: Containers should feel infrastructural and premium.
The GUI should organize the emotion.
Interfaces should feel symbolic instead of literal.
Typography should dominate the composition.
Typography should remain readable at phone size.
The title should create immediate silhouette recognition.
Large typography carries the concept.
Supporting text should not explain the concept.
Metadata should feel editorial instead of informational.
Small text should remain visually subordinate.

computational_atmosphere_system.goal: Create soft computational atmosphere without relying on literal scenery.
rules: Atmosphere should feel infrastructural.
Textures should feel editorial instead of decorative.
Noise should feel calm and controlled.

allowed: soft watercolor washes and painterly gradients
gentle brushwork with visible but controlled brush texture
fine architectural line work blending with painterly surfaces
matte gradients with watercolor bleeding edges
rules: Texture should feel like watercolor illustration meeting architectural precision.

The system should feel hand-painted and atmospheric — inspired by the Recoup marketplace illustration (market.jpeg): semi-realistic watercolor with fine line detail, atmospheric perspective, soft washes.
Brushwork should be visible but refined — like Studio Ghibli background paintings.
Combine soft painterly washes with precise structural elements (wires, frames, circuits rendered as fine linework).

color_system.reference_image: Recoup market.jpeg — the canonical color source
rules: Match the Recoup marketplace illustration (market.jpeg) exactly: pale ice-blue sky (#D8E4EF), warm concrete white ground (#E8E4DC), muted steel-blue clothing (#5B7A90), dusty sage-green robot accents (#B0BCA0).
The palette is muted and desaturated — nothing oversaturated. Cool blues dominate but warm earth tones (concrete, golden leaves, amber) ground the scene.
Atmospheric perspective: foreground is crisp, background fades to pale blue-white haze.
Sage-green is allowed as a secondary accent (robot chassis, foliage) but never as the dominant color. Steel blue (#5B7A90, #6B8BA0) is the primary accent.
Small warm pops (golden-yellow #C8A850, amber #B89850) add life — like scattered leaves or crate details.
Dark elements use charcoal (#3A3A40), never pure black.
Overall feeling: lived-in futuristic — nature growing on technology, humans and robots coexisting casually.

negative_space_system.goal: Whitespace should feel intentional and authoritative.
rules: Empty space should create calmness and hierarchy.
Whitespace should balance typography mass.
Negative space may contain faint computational texture.

brand_signatures.recognition_goal: The system should remain instantly recognizable in a social feed.

should_feel_like: the Recoup marketplace illustration (market.jpeg) — semi-realistic anime illustration with fine ink linework, atmospheric haze, lived-in futuristic world
Studio Ghibli background paintings meets Makoto Shinkai atmospheric perspective
a scene from a future world where nature grows on technology and robots coexist with humans
muted desaturated palette with steel-blue clothing, sage-green machinery, pale ice-blue sky, warm concrete ground
fine visible ink-style linework on edges and architectural structures over soft painterly rendering
should_not_feel_like: dashboard UI or startup SaaS graphics

master_prompt_template.prompt: Semi-realistic anime-style illustration in the style of Recoup's marketplace scene: a lived-in futuristic world where nature grows on technology and small robots coexist with humans. Illustration style: fine ink-style linework on edges and architectural structures, soft painterly rendering with visible brushwork, atmospheric perspective where foreground is crisp and background fades to pale blue-white haze. Color palette: pale ice-blue sky (#D8E4EF), warm concrete white ground (#E8E4DC), muted steel-blue accents (#5B7A90, #6B8BA0), dusty sage-green machinery (#B0BCA0, #8A9A7A), cool architectural greys (#A8AEB4), small warm pops of golden-yellow (#C8A850). Everything muted and desaturated. Soft natural daylight, no dramatic shadows. Composition: strong vanishing point, detailed foreground structures, hazy atmospheric background. Include symbolic infrastructure elements (wires, antennas, routing structures, modular systems). Blend this illustrated world with oversized pixel-geometric ASCII typography for article titles. The typography should feel like a digital overlay on the painted scene — chunky pixel font in charcoal (#3A3A40) or dark steel blue.
master_prompt_template.negative_prompt: photorealistic, CGI, cel-shaded flat anime, cyberpunk neon, oversaturated colors, pure black backgrounds, dashboard UI, startup SaaS design, gaming branding, concept art, glossy rendering, orange-teal grading, heavy shadows, pure watercolor without structure, cluttered composition
